newsSince: No material fundamental news since June 9. June activity (Edge AI Conference Jun 1, COMPUTEX keynote Jun 4, NVIDIA Jetson Thor / physical-AI showcase, Intel Core Ultra Series 3 edge-AI partnership) is promotional/product positioning, not a guidance or contract inflection. Price flat (-0.4%).

sources.label: Advantech NVIDIA GTC 2026 Jetson Thor showcase (Advantech)

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold. Advantech remains a well-positioned but already-recognized edge-computing/industrial-PC supplier; June Edge AI conference, Jetson Thor and Intel partnerships are positioning announcements, not a new bottleneck or guidance inflection. Latent/under-covered premise only partly holds at +70% YTD.
verdicts.bull: Edge AI + physical-AI/robotics (ROS2, WEDA) leverage; Jetson Thor and Intel edge wins.
verdicts.neutral: Established IPC franchise; AI exposure real but diffuse, tied to IPC cycle.
verdicts.bear: Already a recognized edge supplier; +70% YTD reduces 'latent' asymmetry, industrial cycle risk.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Industrial PC cycle recovery + edge-AI box adoption.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Industrial automation demand softness; no choke-point ownership.
